import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_object(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state objects
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_count_s = find_object(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_count_s = find_object(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_s_f = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Next state objects
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_count_n = find_object(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_count_n = find_object(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_n_f = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W - 2)

    # ---- SUCCESS CONDITION ----
    # Pyramid on grid, not held, adjacent (Manhattan dist == 1) to square
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_count_n > 0.5
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    
    success_n = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5)
    success_reward = success_n.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # ---- PHASE DETECTION ----
    just_picked_up = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_put_down = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    # ---- PHASE 1: Not holding pyramid → approach pyramid ----
    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - pyr_x_n)
    
    # Progress toward pyramid
    approach_pyr_progress = (dist_agent_pyr_s - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist
    # Only active when not holding in both states
    phase1_active = (1.0 - holding_s_f) * (1.0 - holding_n_f)
    approach_pyr_reward = phase1_active * approach_pyr_progress * 2.0

    # ---- PICKUP BONUS ----
    pickup_bonus = just_picked_up.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # ---- PHASE 2: Holding pyramid → approach green square ----
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - sq_x_n)
    
    # Progress toward square
    approach_sq_progress = (dist_agent_sq_s - dist_agent_sq_n) / max_dist
    # Only active when holding in both states
    phase2_active = holding_s_f * holding_n_f
    approach_sq_reward = phase2_active * approach_sq_progress * 2.0

    # ---- PUTDOWN REWARD ----
    # When agent puts down pyramid, reward based on how close pyramid is to square
    # If adjacent: large bonus; otherwise small or negative
    putdown_adjacent = just_put_down & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    putdown_not_adjacent = just_put_down & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5)
    putdown_reward = (
        putdown_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0
        + putdown_not_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32) * (-0.5)
    )

    # ---- DENSE SHAPING: when holding, absolute closeness to square ----
    # Reward being close to square while holding (not just progress)
    close_to_sq_holding = holding_n_f * (max_dist - dist_agent_sq_n) / max_dist * 0.5

    # ---- DENSE SHAPING: when not holding, absolute closeness to pyramid ----
    close_to_pyr_not_holding = (1.0 - holding_n_f) * (max_dist - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 0.3

    total_reward = (
        approach_pyr_reward
        + pickup_bonus
        + approach_sq_reward
        + close_to_sq_holding
        + close_to_pyr_not_holding
        + putdown_reward
        + success_reward
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
